hero.headline: Start a conversation about learning, creativity, and impact.
hero.subheading: Whether you are exploring a school partnership, media opportunity, event collaboration, funding conversation, or general enquiry, the team would be glad to hear from you.

intro.heading: Let’s connect.
intro.body: The most meaningful work often begins with a conversation. Reach out to discuss programs, partnerships, speaking opportunities, collaborative projects, or ways to support the mission of World Class Scholars.
